# Teammate External References

> External API documentation, SDK references, and design resources for AI-assisted development.
> This file follows the llms.txt standard to help LLMs quickly discover available reference materials.

## APIs

<!-- Example: -->
<!-- - [Supabase](./supabase/llms.txt): Backend-as-a-Service (Auth, Database, Storage) -->
